title: pithecellobium cochliocarpum
intro: Pithecellobium cochliocarpum, also known as the "Yellow Peacock Tree," is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, among others. In herbal preparations, Pithecellobium cochliocarpum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
